title: Pump station from plant spec (UI)
description: Golden SCADA journey: invent a pump station in the console without naming agent tools. Applying scada-facility-overview must auto-create missing mimicPath (no 404).
prompt: I need a small oil & gas pump station: two gate valves, two pumps, one flow meter, a mimic overview, an operator dashboard, and a high-pressure alert that an operator can see in Alarms.
uiJourney: Login (admin) → Explorer devices → Dashboard + template scada-facility-overview (auto-creates facility-overview mimic) → Mimic editor → Alert → Operator app → Alarms
humanSteps: Sign in as admin at the web console.
Open Explorer → Devices and create virtual devices for valves, pumps, and a flow meter.
Create a Dashboard; apply layout template scada-facility-overview — the platform must create root.platform.mimics.facility-overview if missing (no 404).
Open Mimic editor for facility-overview and place pump/valve symbols; save.
Create a high-pressure alert rule on a pump variable; confirm it appears under Alarms / Alarm Console.
Create an Operator app pointing at the dashboard; open Operator and verify devices table + mimic + alarms.
